title: Fetch failed error in Ollama Node due to incorrect credentials
symptom: The Ollama Node in n8n consistently throws a 'fetch failed' error despite successful network connectivity from the container.
not_this_if: Credentials are correctly set to the Docker network address
root_cause: The error occurs because the credentials for the Local Ollama Model were incorrectly set to 'http://localhost:11434', which does not resolve correctly within the Docker network. Instead, the correct address should be the service name used in the Docker Compose setup.
fix_steps: Open the credentials settings for the Local Ollama Model in n8n
agent_instruction: Update the Local Ollama Model credentials to use the Docker network address 'http://ollama:11434'.
